findings.title: allowedTools iterated as characters instead of parsed as string
findings.issue: Backend returns allowedTools as a comma-separated string. The regenerate handler used for...of to iterate it, which iterates individual characters, producing malformed YAML frontmatter.
findings.suggestion: Use flat string format matching backend pattern: parts.push(`allowed-tools: ${data.allowedTools.trim()}`)
findings.impact: Regenerated skills with allowed-tools would have corrupted YAML frontmatter
